---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in an existing tool
labels: bug
---

**Which tool is affected?**
e.g. JWT Inspector, PDF Merge, Text Diff

**What did you expect to happen?**
A clear description of what you expected the tool to do.

**What actually happened?**
A clear description of what went wrong. Include any error messages shown on screen.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload / paste '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

**Browser and OS**
e.g. Chrome 126 on macOS 14, Firefox 128 on Windows 11

**Additional context**
Any other details that might help — screenshots, sample files (make sure they contain no sensitive data), or console output.
